gap_notes: Previously discovered Connito miner docs URL currently returns 404.

name: ConnitoAI
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN102 using the official ConnitoAI website and source repository. The previously discovered miner docs URL currently returns 404 and is not promoted.

surfaces.name: ConnitoAI SN Owner Phase API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.x schema for the Connito SN102 SN Owner Phase Service (FastAPI title: Phase Service). Served at cycle-api.connito.ai; documents no-auth cycle-coordination routes such as GET /get_phase and GET /blocks_until_next_phase per the official SN Owner Phase API reference.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Cloudflare WAF in front of cycle-api.connito.ai may challenge simple automated probes from datacenter IPs; miners and validators use this host as the locked owner_url in official configuration.

surfaces.name: ConnitoAI SN Owner phase API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /get_phase on cycle-api.connito.ai returning the current training-cycle phase JSON (block height, phase_name, cycle_length, blocks_remaining_in_phase). Default owner_url in official Connito CycleCfg (config.py) and hard-pinned in miner-config.md; documented in the SN Owner Phase API reference.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Cloudflare WAF in front of cycle-api.connito.ai may challenge simple automated probes from datacenter IPs; the endpoint is the official phase oracle queried by miners and validators.

surfaces.name: ConnitoAI previous phase block ranges
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /previous_phase_blocks on cycle-api.connito.ai returning the block-height range of each named phase (Distribute, Train, MinerCommit1/2, Submission, Validate, Merge, ValidatorCommit1/2) in the prior training cycle. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema (already-registered sn-102-connito-phase-openapi surface); same cycle-api.connito.ai host as the existing /get_phase surface.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Cloudflare WAF in front of cycle-api.connito.ai may challenge simple automated probes from datacenter IPs; the endpoint is on the official phase-oracle host queried by miners and validators.
